nodes.name: Fetch Latest IG Posts
nodes.notes: Uses Instagram Basic Display API. Set your long-lived access token in credentials.

nodes.name: Post to TikTok + YouTube
nodes.notes: Set UPLOAD_POST_USERNAME in n8n variables. Auth = your Upload-Post API key.

nodes.name: Notify via Telegram
nodes.notes: Sends you a Telegram DM when a reel gets cross-posted. chatId = Alan's Telegram ID.

parameters.message: No new reels on @alanoderso this hour. Skipping.
